full_text:
Gui Mu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gui Muwas born in Donghai. Solder under colonel Du Song, mutinied and sought alliance with Chang Xi. Tricked and killed by Lü Qian. Gui Mu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Gui Mu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
